ingredients.item: 1 cup (128 g) dried green sticky rice flakes (see Note)
ingredients.original: 1 cup (128 g) dried green sticky rice flakes (see Note)

ingredients.item: ½ cup (120 ml) full-fat, unsweetened coconut milk
ingredients.original: ½ cup (120 ml) full-fat, unsweetened coconut milk

ingredients.item: 2 ounces (56 g) shredded young coconut or 1 ounce (28 g) dried coconut flakes, rehydrated (see Note)
ingredients.original: 2 ounces (56 g) shredded young coconut or 1 ounce (28 g) dried coconut flakes, rehydrated (see Note)

ingredients.item: 2 teaspoons (8 g) toasted sesame seeds, for garnish
ingredients.original: 2 teaspoons (8 g) toasted sesame seeds, for garnish

ingredients.item: 1. In a medium bowl, combine dried green sticky rice with coconut milk, mix well, and let sit for 10 minutes.
ingredients.original: 1. In a medium bowl, combine dried green sticky rice with coconut milk, mix well, and let sit for 10 minutes.

ingredients.item: 2. In a medium skillet, combine shredded coconut and sugar, and cook over medium-low heat, stirring constantly, for about 2 minutes.
ingredients.original: 2. In a medium skillet, combine shredded coconut and sugar, and cook over medium-low heat, stirring constantly, for about 2 minutes.

ingredients.item: 3. Add rice and cook and stir until all rice flakes come together to make one sticky gelatinous mass (3 to 5 minutes). Remove from heat.
ingredients.original: 3. Add rice and cook and stir until all rice flakes come together to make one sticky gelatinous mass (3 to 5 minutes). Remove from heat.

ingredients.item: 4. Divide the mixture into 4 equal-size portions and spoon each onto the center of a rice cracker. Sprinkle with sesame seeds and serve.
ingredients.original: 4. Divide the mixture into 4 equal-size portions and spoon each onto the center of a rice cracker. Sprinkle with sesame seeds and serve.
